VG_RUNTIME=codex VG_REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" python3 "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.claude/scripts/codex-hooks/vg-pre-tool-use-apply-patch.py"
VG_RUNTIME=codex VG_REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" python3 "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.claude/scripts/codex-hooks/vg-stop.py"
VG_RUNTIME=codex VG_REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" python3 "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.claude/scripts/vg-entry-hook.py"
